default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on content strategy and publishing priorities before the website freeze.](https://fathom.video/share/Fy2zyqP-dQr478vex1iynVd4hQdosFyx?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Publishing Unblocked:** Webinar articles are now pre-approved for immediate publication to accelerate content output before the freeze.](https://fathom.video/share/Fy2zyqP-dQr478vex1iynVd4hQdosFyx?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
  - [**Q1 Forecast Needed:** A Q1 SEO forecast (Feb–Apr) is due next week, with a clear disclaimer on the expected traffic dip from the freeze and glossary consolidation.](https://fathom.video/share/Fy2zyqP-dQr478vex1iynVd4hQdosFyx?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [**Content Pipeline Accelerated:** The team will front-load publishing by reactivating \~80 high-performing articles and prioritizing Emily's review of 15+ new pieces.](https://fathom.video/share/Fy2zyqP-dQr478vex1iynVd4hQdosFyx?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
  - [**Educational Hub Wireframes Begin:** Wireframes for the new hub start this week to ensure the project is ready for development immediately after the freeze.](https://fathom.video/share/Fy2zyqP-dQr478vex1iynVd4hQdosFyx?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)

## Topics

### Q1 SEO Forecast & Traffic Impact

  - [A Q1 SEO forecast (Feb–Apr) is needed next week for an internal planning presentation.](https://fathom.video/share/Fy2zyqP-dQr478vex1iynVd4hQdosFyx?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [**Key Caveats for the Forecast:**](https://fathom.video/share/Fy2zyqP-dQr478vex1iynVd4hQdosFyx?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
      - [**Website Freeze:** Publishing will pause for the freeze, which overlaps with Abnormal's Q1 start in February.](https://fathom.video/share/Fy2zyqP-dQr478vex1iynVd4hQdosFyx?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
      - [**Glossary Consolidation:** High-ranking pages (`/jailbreak` & `/ai-prompt`) will be redirected to a single glossary folder, causing a temporary traffic dip.](https://fathom.video/share/Fy2zyqP-dQr478vex1iynVd4hQdosFyx?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [**Rationale:** The forecast must quantify these impacts to demonstrate the freeze's business cost and set realistic expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/Fy2zyqP-dQr478vex1iynVd4hQdosFyx?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)

### Accelerating Content Pipeline for Freeze

  - [**Problem:** Emily's review capacity (5 articles/week) is the current bottleneck, with a backlog of 15+ articles.](https://fathom.video/share/Fy2zyqP-dQr478vex1iynVd4hQdosFyx?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [**Solution:**](https://fathom.video/share/Fy2zyqP-dQr478vex1iynVd4hQdosFyx?tab=summary&timestamp=975.0)
      - [**Pre-approve Webinar Articles:** Publish immediately to remove a review blocker.](https://fathom.video/share/Fy2zyqP-dQr478vex1iynVd4hQdosFyx?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
      - [**Prioritize Emily's Review:** Focus on new articles that mention Abnormal.](https://fathom.video/share/Fy2zyqP-dQr478vex1iynVd4hQdosFyx?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)
      - [**Reactivate High-Performing Articles:** Republish \~80 articles previously deactivated by Kali if they align with the new Educational Hub strategy and drove past traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/Fy2zyqP-dQr478vex1iynVd4hQdosFyx?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
      - [**Increase Writer Output:** 18 articles are in production to build a full review queue for Emily.](https://fathom.video/share/Fy2zyqP-dQr478vex1iynVd4hQdosFyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1017.0)

### Educational Hub & Content Strategy

  - [**Wireframe Development:** Starts this week for the new hub, including:](https://fathom.video/share/Fy2zyqP-dQr478vex1iynVd4hQdosFyx?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
      - [Navigational hub landing page](https://fathom.video/share/Fy2zyqP-dQr478vex1iynVd4hQdosFyx?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
      - [Long-form content page](https://fathom.video/share/Fy2zyqP-dQr478vex1iynVd4hQdosFyx?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
      - [Content cluster page](https://fathom.video/share/Fy2zyqP-dQr478vex1iynVd4hQdosFyx?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
      - [Search results page](https://fathom.video/share/Fy2zyqP-dQr478vex1iynVd4hQdosFyx?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [**Keyword Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/Fy2zyqP-dQr478vex1iynVd4hQdosFyx?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
      - [**Blog Content:** Abnormal-related keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/Fy2zyqP-dQr478vex1iynVd4hQdosFyx?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
      - [**Educational Hub Content:** Mid-level to high-level cybersecurity keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/Fy2zyqP-dQr478vex1iynVd4hQdosFyx?tab=summary&timestamp=534.0)
  - [**Process Communication:** The team's 3–6 month article review and rewrite process must be explicitly included in the plan presented to Warren.](https://fathom.video/share/Fy2zyqP-dQr478vex1iynVd4hQdosFyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jo:**](https://fathom.video/share/Fy2zyqP-dQr478vex1iynVd4hQdosFyx?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
      - [Publish webinar articles immediately.](https://fathom.video/share/Fy2zyqP-dQr478vex1iynVd4hQdosFyx?tab=summary&timestamp=340.0)
      - [Create a list of \~80 deactivated articles for potential reactivation.](https://fathom.video/share/Fy2zyqP-dQr478vex1iynVd4hQdosFyx?tab=summary&timestamp=828.0)
      - [Deliver the Q1 SEO forecast next week, including freeze/consolidation caveats.](https://fathom.video/share/Fy2zyqP-dQr478vex1iynVd4hQdosFyx?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
      - [Ensure the 3–6 month rewrite process is in the plan for Warren.](https://fathom.video/share/Fy2zyqP-dQr478vex1iynVd4hQdosFyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
      - [Send the GrowthX proposal next week.](https://fathom.video/share/Fy2zyqP-dQr478vex1iynVd4hQdosFyx?tab=summary&timestamp=1121.0)
  - [**Abnormal Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/Fy2zyqP-dQr478vex1iynVd4hQdosFyx?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
      - [Prioritize Emily's review of the 15+ new articles.](https://fathom.video/share/Fy2zyqP-dQr478vex1iynVd4hQdosFyx?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)

action_items.description: Publish webinar articles as ready; coordinate w/ Emily on tagging
Kick off Educational Hub wireframes; coordinate CTAs/visuals w/ Megan
Run keyword research for blog + Educational Hub; tag blog vs educational
Send Q1 forecast to 16502246070; include freeze/glossary impacts
Email Emily re: review cadence; request pre-freeze prioritization
List high-traffic deactivated articles; get approval; republish pre-freeze
Move 16502246070's article to Ready to Stage; add 16502246070 as reviewer
Direct writers to finish 18 in-progress articles ASAP
Complete operational handoff to Andy before Feb 9
